formattedAddress: Dobrota Kamp bb, Dobrota 85330, Црна Гора

text.text:
I visited Dental Studio Vučetić in Kotor and was extremely satisfied with the services.The doctor also speaks English, which really satisfied me.Everything was done incredibly fast, precisely and very professionally.The procedures were comfortable with no unnecessary waiting.Highly recommended!
Рекомендую эту стоматологию, врач профессионал, работает очень быстро и качественно, хорошая цена за услуги.

text.text: A pleasant experience, from quick reception to implementation, Dr. Vucetic and the assistant are a well-coordinated team....., from trust to perfect results...really satisfied...

originalText.text: A pleasant experience, from quick reception to implementation, Dr. Vucetic and the assistant are a well-coordinated team....., from trust to perfect results...really satisfied...

text.text:
I’d like to thank Dr. Zoran’s team and his dental clinic for their work and professionalism!!

I went through a long, multi-stage treatment here, including general dental work and implant procedures. The whole process took time, but everything was well organized and handled carefully at every stage.

Special thanks to Dr. Zoran, Dr. Milan and Maja for their attentive approach and consistent support throughout the treatment. They were always available to answer questions and explain everything clearly.

It was also truly helpful that the clinic provides a translator, who made it much easier to understand more complex terminology and communicate clearly.

Overall, it was a well-organized and thorough experience, and I can surely recommend this clinic to anyone considering comprehensive dental treatment, including implants.

text.text:
Ich war im März 2026 zur Behandlung in der Zahnarzt Praxis Vučetić, Nähe Kotor! Nach einer Zahnextraction 3 Wochen zuvor in meiner Heimat in DE mussten - nachdem die Schwellung abgeklungen war- vorstehende schmerzhafte Knochenteile entfernt werden. Die Behandlung durch Dr. Zoran will ich als perfekt bezeichnen! Er hat mir alles erklärt und alle meine Fragen freundlich und ausführlich beantwortet. Von dem Einstich für die Betäubung bis zum Abschluss durch 2 Nähte habe ich nichts gespürt! Das entfernen der Nähte 1 Woche später war ebenso völlig schmerzlos. Dr. Zoran und seine Mitarbeiterin hat die ganze Behandlung für mich angenehm und wie ich meine professionell durchgezogen!
Ich bin jetzt wieder völlig schmerzfrei!
Die von mir benötigte Rechnung wurde mir mit den von der Versicherung gewünschten Daten anstandslos angefertigt!
Alles in allem bin ich mehr als zufrieden mit der Behandlung in der Praxis Vučetić und bedanke mich nochmals herzlich bei Dr. Zoran. Von mir volle Empfehlung!

text.text: An exceptional dental experience from start to finish. The space is calming, the equipment is top-tier, and the staff is wonderfully friendly. Dr. Zoran is a true expert—thorough, calm, and communicative. A blessing to have found this practice.

originalText.text: An exceptional dental experience from start to finish. The space is calming, the equipment is top-tier, and the staff is wonderfully friendly. Dr. Zoran is a true expert—thorough, calm, and communicative. A blessing to have found this practice.

text.text: Dr. Vucetic and his staff were top notch. I made my appointment before arriving in Montenegro on WhatsApp. Super easy and no language barrier to worry about. I thought I needed a crown for a cracked tooth but after taking x-rays, Dr Vucetic assured me my tooth was healthy and only needed a new filling. Quick and easy!

I thought I needed a crown for a cracked tooth but after taking x-rays, Dr Vucetic assured me my tooth was healthy and only needed a new filling. Quick and easy!

text.text: Vucetic dental studio was aces. Fit us in same-day/last minute and saved the 2nd half of vacation for us.  Very careful and precise work to make sure I was comfortable and that the work would last for years to come. Would recommend highly. Thank you Doctor!

text.text: brzo precizno i bezbolno

originalText.text: brzo precizno i bezbolno

text.text: Excellent English speaking dentist for any emergency when travelling. Very generously treated me out of hours and on a weekend which saved my holiday! Highly recommend if anyone has a dental issue whilst in and around Kotor.

originalText.text: Excellent English speaking dentist for any emergency when travelling. Very generously treated me out of hours and on a weekend which saved my holiday! Highly recommend if anyone has a dental issue whilst in and around Kotor.

text.text: I am so grateful to Doctor Vucetic for fitting me in for an urgent appointment when my host in Kotor told me that he is the best Dentist in the area. I'm on holiday from Australia and I was very stressed that part of my crown broke off while eating and I was nervous when I walked into the surgery, but I was greeted so warmly by Doctor Vucetic and his lovely assistant (who both speak perfect English) and when I read Doctor Vucetic's impressive qualifications, I immediately relaxed. He took an x-ray to ensure there was no infection and then removed the remainder of the old crown and made me a new temporary crown right there and then and the best thing is that I didn't feel any pain. I felt so relieved and happy when I left and I cannot thank Doctor Vucetic enough. Also the cost of the appointment was very reasonable and the environment is very stylish and modern.

text.text: During vacation in Kotor, I suddenly got a painfull toothache. I reached out to Dr. Vučetić for a check-up, and he was able to see me the very next morning! He conducted all the necessary checkups, started treatment right away, and gave me advice for future care, including recommendations for follow-up once I return home. If you're ever in Kotor or the surrounding areas and face any dental issues, I highly recommend stopping by Dental Studio Vučetić. Fantastic service and a really caring team!  :)

If you're ever in Kotor or the surrounding areas and face any dental issues, I highly recommend stopping by Dental Studio Vučetić. Fantastic service and a really caring team!  :)

text.text:
I'd like to express deep gratitude to Doctor Zoran and his assistant Maya. My case was not the simplest one I am afraid. I had been putting off a visit to the dentist for over 10 years. It may sound crazy but the main reason was anticipating pain, fear of potential negative consequences. But the time came to make my meeting a dentist . In fact it was a stroke of luck as we are a newcomers in this place so it was in fact a random choice. Things do happen so I've found my place and my doctor. I have been having appointments with the clinic for about a month having my teeth been treated, extracted , laser cleaned ... And to crown it all- a new denture. It's a kind of a piece of art both in terms of precision and appearance. And this is how Dr Zoran treats it. You feel like a model getting ready for a catwalk modelling your stunning smile! I also appreciate the atmosphere in this clinic. They make you feel comfortable the very moment you step in. To my mind it's the first thing to create a bond and trust the doctor. One more thing to mention. Dr Vucetic is always ready to give you a helping hand in consulting on your personal issues. No doubt I'd be happy to recommend Dr Vucetic to anybody who experinces problems with teeth. May success attend you.

Nataliia Dobrynina

I am incredibly happy to have found this clinic!From the bottom of my heart,I want to thank the amazing doctor and his wonderful assistant!Their professionalism,kindness,and attention to detail make every visit a truly pleasant experience!
The clinic has a warm & welcoming atmosphere,end the entire team is highly skilled and caring.The doctor has golden hands-every procedure is done with precision and without pain.I am 100 % satisfied with every visit!
If you are looking for the best dental care,this is the place to go!Highly recommended!

text.text: Naaaaajbolji stomatolog!!!

originalText.text: Naaaaajbolji stomatolog!!!

text.text: Je suis phobique des dentistes, je suis sensible à la douleur et j'ai un anglais très moyen. Si vous souhaitez le meilleur dentiste du Monténégro ne cherchez plus! Un travail d'une précision chirurgicale rare, sans anesthésie (pour ma part) et totalement indolore, un accueil, une patience et une gentillesse infinie, un goût prononcé pour l'esthétique dentaire et des explications détaillées de chaque geste pendant l' intervention. Il m'a sauvé ma dentition.

originalText.text: Je suis phobique des dentistes, je suis sensible à la douleur et j'ai un anglais très moyen. Si vous souhaitez le meilleur dentiste du Monténégro ne cherchez plus! Un travail d'une précision chirurgicale rare, sans anesthésie (pour ma part) et totalement indolore, un accueil, une patience et une gentillesse infinie, un goût prononcé pour l'esthétique dentaire et des explications détaillées de chaque geste pendant l' intervention. Il m'a sauvé ma dentition.

text.text: Walked in to find out about securing a hygiene routine appointment and was provided with a small consultation followed by an appointment the next day. The equipment all look very up to date, rooms bright and clean with a very welcoming reception area. Reasonably priced, cash payment. I would recommended using this practice to anyone who is travelling through away from home for the foreseeable future and needing routine checks/cleaning professionally carried out :)

text.text:
This clinic is a disaster! They installed a filling, which fell out after about 3 weeks. After this, Dr. Vučetić rudely stated that this was a non-guarantee case and again demanded the full amount for reinstalling the filling. I've had fillings from other doctors for at least 6 years. I went to another clinic.

Mr./Mrs. "P. S.", who left a laudatory review on June 11, 2024, have you been to the clinic at all? Your review resembles text from an advertising brochure - a lot of empty words and no specifics. Mr. Vučetić, don't disgrace yourself - you are not even able to write a fake review, let alone install a high-quality filling.

text.text:
Dental Studio Vucetic provides an exemplary dental care experience marked by professional excellence, modern technology, and a patient-centric approach. From the moment you walk through the doors, you are greeted with a warm, welcoming atmosphere that immediately puts you at ease. The studio’s team of highly skilled dentists and hygienists take the time to thoroughly understand each patient’s needs and concerns, ensuring personalized and effective treatment plans.

The clinic is equipped with state-of-the-art dental technology, allowing for precise diagnostics and treatments. Whether it’s a routine cleaning, cosmetic dentistry, or more complex procedures like implants or orthodontics, Dental Studio Vucetic delivers superior outcomes with minimal discomfort.

Patient comfort and satisfaction are at the heart of their service philosophy. The staff is not only knowledgeable but also compassionate, making sure that every visit is as pleasant and stress-free as possible. The transparent communication about procedures, costs, and aftercare is particularly commendable, fostering trust and confidence in their care.

Overall, Dental Studio Vucetic stands out for its unwavering commitment to excellence in dental care. It's a top-notch choice for anyone seeking professional, reliable, and comfortable dental services.

The clinic is equipped with state-of-the-art dental technology, allowing for precise diagnostics and treatments. Whether it’s a routine cleaning, cosmetic dentistry, or more complex procedures like implants or orthodontics, Dental Studio Vucetic delivers superior outcomes with minimal discomfort.

Patient comfort and satisfaction are at the heart of their service philosophy. The staff is not only knowledgeable but also compassionate, making sure that every visit is as pleasant and stress-free as possible. The transparent communication about procedures, costs, and aftercare is particularly commendable, fostering trust and confidence in their care.

Overall, Dental Studio Vucetic stands out for its unwavering commitment to excellence in dental care. It's a top-notch choice for anyone seeking professional, reliable, and comfortable dental services.

text.text:
I was in this clinic in October 2023 - and I didn't like it then, but I decided to write only now, since Zoran Vučetić recently showed himself to be a petty swindler, not giving away the x-rays that belonged to me. Here is a list of disadvantages that were discovered during just one visit:

1. It all started with the fact that in a correspondence Vučetić promised a filling for about 60 euros, in the end I paid 70 euros and left without a filling at all.

2. Immediately after entering the clinic, an attempt is made to impose orthopan without any indication for this, without even looking at the patient.

3. Two x-rays of one tooth (second molar) were taken from almost the same angle, under the pretext that the tooth was large and the whole tooth would not fit on one x-ray. It's easy to find information about the length of the roots of different teeth. So, for example, the roots of incisors are even longer than those of molars. That is, according to Vučetić, it turns out that it's generally impossible to cover one tooth with one x-ray. Of course, this is not so, that is, Vučetić lied. As a result, I received a double dose of radiation and double payment.

4. Vučetić cut my tooth a little with a drilling machine, and asked me to rinse my mouth with ice water immediately after using the drilling machine. The water was clearly not at room temperature, but specially cooled. As a result, a little enamel chipped off (either right during the visit, or a little later). I think this was done on purpose. The fact is that all dentists recommend avoiding sudden changes in temperature so as not to damage tooth enamel, but Vučetić did everything to damage it. This is direct harm to the patient.

5. Vučetić advised me to brush my teeth with chlorhexidine solution instead of toothpaste for a week every month. This is a very dubious recommendation. I spent some time checking it out - and nowhere did I find anyone recommending this. I'm sure that this is not some Montenegrin know-how, but Vučetić's desire to damage the patient's teeth (see another method in the clause 4).

6. When I asked Vučetić a question about the second tooth after a short conversation about the first one, he refused to answer, saying that he preferred to discuss only one tooth at one consultation. And his "consultation" costs 30 euros. That is, to briefly discuss the whole mouth, you need to pay 32 x 30 = 960 euros for his non-professional advices.

7. The clinic offers coffee while waiting for an appointment. They may think it's hospitable, but in my opinion it's unprofessional, since the patient doesn't have the opportunity to brush his teeth after coffee and before sitting in the dentist's chair. There are some reasons not to drink coffee immediately before a dentist appointment: staining of teeth, increased sensitivity of teeth, increased excitability of the nervous system, caffeine interferes with the anesthesia.

8. Vučetić refuses to provide my x-ray images in DICOM format - he pretends that he doesn't understand how to export DICOM. Although in the screenshot that he sent me, the "Export DICOM Dir" button is clearly visible. Vučetić also says some nonsense, that he doesn't have a radiological center and doesn't provide consultations to other dentists. What does the center and other dentists have to do with it? I paid for these x-rays and have the right to receive them.

9. Vučetić doesn't issue any receipts or any documents at all, he only accepts cash - this is illegal. Firstly, you cannot prove that you were at the clinic in case of any problems after treatment. Secondly, he appears to be evading taxes. The Montenegrin authorities have been fighting such "businessmen" for several years now, and there is an opportunity to report this kind of violation. After this, the "businessman" should receive a fine.

As a result, after my visit I didn't have the impression that I had been to the dentist. It was as if I was visiting some local swindler who installed a dental chair and pretended to be a doctor. My advice: stay away from Zoran Vučetić and his clinic.

text.text:
We missed our cleaning at home because we are traveling. I also wanted to whiten my teeth, but in the US it is too expensive. Here it was perfect. We went to check it out, and they took us immediately for a cleaning and X-rays. The next day we came back for a cleaning and the dentist did both of us together at one time. The office was high tech, professional and half the cost of our dentist in the United States. I recommend Dental Studio Vucetic.
Just be prepared to pay cash.

text.text:
Meine herausgefallene Zahnkrone hat mich heute spontan zu Dr. Vucetic geführt. Ich bin ohne Termin direkt behandelt worden. Der Arzt sowie seine Assistentin sprechen sehr gutes Englisch, sind sehr nett und freundlich und machten handwerklich auf mich einen super Eindruck.
Dr. Vucetic hat den Karies unter der Krone entfernt, eine neue Füllung gemacht (50 €) und die Krone wieder befestigt (60 €). Im Vergleich zu deutschen Preisen sehr günstig. Danke für die schnelle Hilfe.

text.text: I came into this office for some urgent issues  as well as couple persisting problems. Not only was the dentist able to see me extremely fast, but he did a fantastic job. Best service I’ve had at a dentist, better than the ones I’ve had in Canada. 10/10 staff, great price, and I fully recommend if you’re a tourist and need a check up/immediate attention.

Sve pohvale za kompletan tim, naročito za doktora Vučetića. Profesionalnost i ljubaznost na najvišem nivou. Svaka preporuka.
P.s. Išla sam zbog pigmentacije kompozitne fasete što smo uspješno riješili tretmanom izbjeljivanja iznutra tako da zamjena postojeće nije bila ni potrebna.

text.text:
I had several things done in three visits to this dental office while on a 8 day vacation.
Dr. Vucetic and Maja were pleasant and efficient and I am very happy with everything I had done. Maja even gave me great recommendations of things to do and restaurants to try. The studio is beautiful and the location is very easy to get to and very close to old town Kotor.  I will definitely be back and would recommend to anyone.

I dont know whats up with Montenegro people but I think they are lazy once they have enough money the just don’t want to work.

text.text:
We were visiting this wonderful clinic during our holiday in June and having an appointments with Dr Zoran Vucetic.
We had very professional approach and dental work for crowns, fillings, hygiene clean.
All of this work was done in about a week for a very reasonable charge compared to the UK.
We appreciate the teamwork and their efforts. Thank you very much!🙏

text.text: As an expatriate it is never easy to find a competent person who speaks English very well. I think I have found the rare pearl with the Vučetić dental office team! Zoran is always very invested in what is needed and he is very sharp, much more than any other dentist I have tested in the past, he explains everything he does very well. And his team always assists us with a smile and professionalism. I highly recommend!

text.text:
I was on vecation in Kotor and got a bad infection and swelling which is not a pleasant experience especially on a vacation.
I went to the hospital and they suggested that I contact this clinic, it was already late at night but these wonderful owners has just opened the clinic and I was edequetly helped as if I were their first patient that day.
I even got a follow up check the next day and was contacted multiple times when I was already back in The Netherlands asking about my health.
long story short.. very professional and absolutly recomended.

text.text: I had to have a root canal while I was on vacation in Kotor. Dr. Zoran Vučetić was amazing. He made time for me immediately. He took care of the infection, then did the root canal and finally the crown. He was very friendly and helpful and his English was amazing. He took the time to show me exactly what he was doing. He had top of the line machines and the office is spotlessly clean. The whole process cost less than half what I paid for in the US. I highly recommend him and his team.

text.text: Went there last year to get a deep clean and whitening molds fitted with the serums. Went great. Amazing service, speaks perfect english. Nice office. Really happy with how things turned out. Would definitely recommend if you're in Kotor.

text.text:
Excellent clinic. Top level. English speaking.

I went in because of an emergency toothache that ended up requiring a root canal. The dentist treated me very politely, addressed my pain and booked me for two appointments to get the procedure.

I was very comfortable during the procedures. They communicated what was needed, what I should expect during and after the treatment. All of this was supported with some x-rays, Wich made me feel assured that the job was being done correctly.

All and all the price point is good and I'm considering going for the whitening.

text.text: Al dagen had ik een lichte pijn in mijn kies, tenminste ik vermoedde dat het aan een kies lag. De pijn werd ineens heftiger. Een week met pijn rondlopen en niet weten wat er aan de hand is, durfde ik niet aan. Wat een geluk dat ik tandartsstoel van Zoran Vucetic terecht kwam! Hij stelde me in goed Engels gerust. De prik van de verdoving was pijnloos evenals de behandeling. Keurig vertelde hij wat ging doen. Hij heeft de zenuw gekalmeerd en terug in Nederland kan ik meteen naar mijn eigen tandarts voor verdere behandeling. Zeer kundige tandarts en assistente die ik iedereen zal willen aanraden!

text.text: Dr. Zoran is a highly-skilled and talented dental surgeon! I had several complicated issues and Dr. Zoran used his skill and expertise to create a comprehensive plan for my reconstruction that included planned implant therapy, bone augmentation and cad-cam temporary bridge work. His facilities are truly state-of-the-art and he and his staff are friendly and wonderful to work with. I am so thankful to have found this practice and highly recommend you becoming a patient! Dr. Zoran understands  and exceeds his patient's needs and expectations. I couldn't be more pleased with the results!

text.text:
I was onboard a ship visiting Kotar when the need for a dentist was necessary. The ships
conceiege contacted his contact at the Port who got me an appointment that morning and a ride. The ride cost us 30 euro and the driver came back for us. Not far to go but worth not having to hassle with a cab.
The doctor was very nice. X-rays were taken and he determined the treatment and I was out in an hour. I appreciated that he and his assistant spoke English.
I paid 120 euro for the experience....in cash.
Always travel with extra for these just in case moments!!

After I got home I went to my dentist who said the dentist in kotar had done a fine job of emergency work. Still need a root canal but, I was attended to well.

text.text: Zoran, the dentist, was recommended by my best friend who lives in nearby Ljuta.  I had an emergency because a crown had come off and I was desperate to have it glued back on.  My friend brought me to the office where we were greeted by Zoran's assistant, Maya, who was friendly and attentive.  After Zoran finished with his customer, he came out to greet us and took us into his well-appointed room with the latest equipment.  He studied the situation and took care of my problem quickly and efficiently and for a reasonable price.

text.text: I was on a Royal Caribbean cruise and had a filling come out. I walked thirty minutes to this dentist on a Saturday and he was open. He spoke wonderful English and was so professional. He took an X-ray and repaired my filling for 80 euro. He lives right above his office so if you need him, call his number for excellent care.

originalText.text: I was on a Royal Caribbean cruise and had a filling come out. I walked thirty minutes to this dentist on a Saturday and he was open. He spoke wonderful English and was so professional. He took an X-ray and repaired my filling for 80 euro. He lives right above his office so if you need him, call his number for excellent care.

text.text: I'm more than pleased. I needed a cleaning and Dr Zoran used an Airflow machine - which is so good it doesn't take very long. I had very stained teeth from coffee and I actually thought of having a whitening session - but frankly, he left my teeth so clean I didn't need to whiten them. He also answered promptly on Facebook messenger (the only dentist who replied of the several I contacted) and was extremely pleasant and professional. Would definitely repeat the experience if I'm ever back in Kotor.

text.text: I got a small crack in my front teeth at the middle of my vacations, since I am staying for two nights in Kotor I contacted Dr Zoran Vučetić whom was really kind to attend me without an appointment. The attention was professional and quick, he explain all the details about the intervention.  The clinic is really well located and nice, five minutes driving from the center of Kotor.
